name: IDT CORP
business: IDT Corporation provides fintech and communications solutions including point-of-sale systems for independent retailers, cross-border money transfers, AI-powered unified communications, prepaid digital offerings, international calling, and wholesale telecom services.
sellsTo: Independent retailers (convenience stores, bodegas, liquor, grocery, tobacco)
Immigrant communities in the United States and Canada

exposures.sentence: BOSS Money provides fintech-based services featuring cross-border money transfers to customers in the United States.
net2phone provides businesses with AI-powered communications solutions that analyse, inform, and manage communications for enhanced productivity.
IDT Global provides wholesale international voice and SMS termination and outsourced traffic management solutions to telecoms worldwide.
National Retail Solutions (NRS): Operates a leading point-of-sale, or POS, terminal-based platform for independent retailers in the United States.
Cyberattacks impacting our networks or systems could have an adverse effect on our business.

catalysts.event: net2phone Canada slated to go into production early in fiscal 2026
catalysts.sentence: net2phone Canada is slated to go into production early in fiscal 2026.

catalysts.event: Capital expenditures in fiscal 2026 expected to be $19 million to $21 million
catalysts.sentence: We currently anticipate that total capital expenditures in fiscal 2026 will be $19 million to $21 million.

catalysts.event: Cash dividend of $0.06 per share payable on October 10, 2025
catalysts.sentence: In September 2025, our Board of Directors declared a cash dividend on our Class A and Class B common stock of $0.06 per share payable on or about October 10, 2025 to stockholders of record as of the close of business on September 30, 2025.

catalysts.event: Oral argument in Straight Path class action appeal scheduled for October 2025
catalysts.sentence: Oral argument is scheduled for October 2025.
